pi_items.source: Verified via export_result.sh which defines out_path='/home/ga/AstroImages/processed/master_stack.fits' for quality analysis.
Verified via setup_task.sh which defines DITHER_DIR='/home/ga/AstroImages/dithered_sequence' and generates the synthetic frames there.
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly defines 5 static shifts: [(0, 0), (12, -15), (-20, 8), (5, 25), (-18, -12)] to generate exactly 5 frames.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 5 synthetically dithered frames generated by adding static pixel shifts and random Gaussian noise to a single real FITS base image (either WASP-12b or HST sample). The setup script places these 5 frames in /home/ga/AstroImages/dithered_sequence. The verifier strictly checks for the final output at /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/master_stack.fits.
